displayName: Cloud Run container crash — prod startup eller runtime

documentation.content:
En prod Cloud Run-container krasjet ved oppstart eller runtime (non-zero exit, fail-to-start, eller readiness-probe-feil). User-affecting hvis revisjonen ikke blir ready: trafikk fortsetter mot forrige revision (Cloud Run rollback automatisk), men nye deploys av samme bygg vil feile.

Vanlig årsak: missing env-var (fail-fast throw), eller exception under app init. Sjekk Cloud Run-logs for berørt service.

conditions.displayName: Container failed to start eller exit non-zero

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND (resource.labels.service_name="main-api" OR resource.labels.service_name="web-api" OR resource.labels.service_name="zipper-service-v2" OR resource.labels.service_name="image-processor-v2" OR resource.labels.service_name="video-processor-v2") AND (textPayload:"Container called exit" OR textPayload:"failed to start" OR textPayload:"container failed" OR jsonPayload.message:"Container called exit")
